description_long: This is a disposable coffee cup with a matte beige body and a black plastic lid, commonly seen in urban environments such as coffee shops or carried by pedestrians. The cup is cylindrical with a slight taper towards the base, and the lid fits snugly on top, featuring a raised drinking spout. The body of the cup is made from paper or cardboard, while the lid is likely made of injection-molded plastic. One side of the cup displays a partially visible logo or branding, reading 'MR GRUMPY' with additional smaller text and decorative elements. The surface of the cup is smooth and untextured, with no visible handle. The overall appearance is clean and functional, designed for single-use beverage consumption.
description: A beige disposable coffee cup with a black plastic lid and visible branding on one side. The cup is smooth, cylindrical, and lacks a handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the beige cup body and black lid, with no visible branding or text.
description_view_1: Side view with the cup's plain beige surface and black lid, still no visible branding.
description_view_2: Angled view revealing the 'MR GRUMPY' branding and decorative text on the cup's surface.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the edge of the branding and the seam of the cup, with the lid's spout visible.
